label: Recipe
description: Defines a crafting or surgical recipe that can be performed at a work table or on a pawn.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class that implements the actual recipe work logic. Defaults to RecipeWorker.

workerCounterClass.label: Worker counter class
workerCounterClass.description: C# class used to count how many times this recipe has been performed. Defaults to RecipeWorkerCounter.

jobString.label: Job string
jobString.description: Short text displayed in the job bar while a pawn is performing this recipe.

requiredGiverWorkType.label: Required giver work type
requiredGiverWorkType.description: WorkTypeDef the pawn must have enabled to perform this recipe.

workAmount.label: Work amount
workAmount.description: Base work ticks required to complete this recipe before speed modifiers. Use -1 to derive the value from the product's WorkToMake stat.

workSpeedStat.label: Work speed stat
workSpeedStat.description: StatDef that scales how fast a pawn performs this recipe.

efficiencyStat.label: Efficiency stat
efficiencyStat.description: StatDef that scales the yield quantity of this recipe's products.

workTableEfficiencyStat.label: Work table efficiency stat
workTableEfficiencyStat.description: StatDef read from the work table to scale product yield. Defaults to WorkTableEfficiencyFactor.

workTableSpeedStat.label: Work table speed stat
workTableSpeedStat.description: StatDef read from the work table to scale recipe work speed. Defaults to WorkTableWorkSpeedFactor.

ingredients.label: Ingredients
ingredients.description: List of ingredient slots. Each slot specifies a ThingFilter and how many units are consumed.

fixedIngredientFilter.label: Fixed ingredient filter
fixedIngredientFilter.description: ThingFilter that locks which specific things can be used as ingredients, overriding category-based selection. Initialized to an empty ThingFilter if omitted.

defaultIngredientFilter.label: Default ingredient filter
defaultIngredientFilter.description: ThingFilter providing the initial ingredient selection the player can adjust. Auto-copied from fixedIngredientFilter if omitted.

allowMixingIngredients.label: Allow mixing ingredients
allowMixingIngredients.description: Whether ingredients from different sources can be combined within a single batch.

ignoreIngredientCountTakeEntireStacks.label: Ignore ingredient count take entire stacks
ignoreIngredientCountTakeEntireStacks.description: When true, entire stacks are consumed regardless of the ingredient count.

ingredientValueGetterClass.label: Ingredient value getter class
ingredientValueGetterClass.description: Private C# class name used to determine the value of each ingredient for counting and filtering. Defaults to IngredientValueGetter_Volume.

forceHiddenSpecialFilters.label: Force hidden special filters
forceHiddenSpecialFilters.description: SpecialThingFilterDefs that are hidden from the ingredient filter UI even if normally visible.

autoStripCorpses.label: Auto strip corpses
autoStripCorpses.description: Whether corpse ingredients are automatically stripped of equipment before being consumed.

interruptIfIngredientIsRotting.label: Interrupt if ingredient is rotting
interruptIfIngredientIsRotting.description: Whether the recipe bill is cancelled if a selected ingredient begins to rot.

products.label: Products
products.description: Map of ThingDef defNames to output counts produced when the recipe completes. Each child element name is a ThingDef defName and its text content is the integer count.

specialProducts.label: Special products
specialProducts.description: List of special product types produced instead of normal products. Each entry is a SpecialProductType enum value.

productHasIngredientStuff.label: Product has ingredient stuff
productHasIngredientStuff.description: When true, the product inherits its stuff type from the primary ingredient.

useIngredientsForColor.label: Use ingredients for color
useIngredientsForColor.description: When true, the product's color is derived from the ingredient's color.

targetCountAdjustment.label: Target count adjustment
targetCountAdjustment.description: Multiplier applied to the bill target count when determining how many times the recipe needs to run.

unfinishedThingDef.label: Unfinished thing def
unfinishedThingDef.description: ThingDef used to represent the partially completed item on the work table while the recipe is in progress.

skillRequirements.label: Skill requirements
skillRequirements.description: Minimum skill levels the worker pawn must have to perform this recipe.

workSkill.label: Work skill
workSkill.description: SkillDef used for pawn skill checks and XP gain while performing this recipe.

workSkillLearnFactor.label: Work skill learn factor
workSkillLearnFactor.description: Multiplier applied to skill XP earned while performing this recipe.

effectWorking.label: Effect working
effectWorking.description: EffecterDef played while a pawn is actively performing this recipe.

soundWorking.label: Sound working
soundWorking.description: SoundDef played as a sustainer while this recipe is in progress.

uiIconThing.label: UI icon thing
uiIconThing.description: Private field. ThingDef whose icon is used to represent this recipe in the UI. Falls back to the produced ThingDef if omitted.

uiIconPath.label: UI icon path
uiIconPath.description: Private field. Content path to a texture used as the recipe icon, overriding the ThingDef icon.

recipeUsers.label: Recipe users
recipeUsers.description: ThingDef references listing which buildings this recipe appears on.

appliedOnFixedBodyParts.label: Applied on fixed body parts
appliedOnFixedBodyParts.description: List of BodyPartDef references. The surgery can only be performed on these specific body parts.

appliedOnFixedBodyPartGroups.label: Applied on fixed body part groups
appliedOnFixedBodyPartGroups.description: List of BodyPartGroupDef references. The surgery can be performed on any body part belonging to these groups.

addsHediff.label: Adds hediff
addsHediff.description: HediffDef applied to the target pawn on successful completion of this surgery.

removesHediff.label: Removes hediff
removesHediff.description: HediffDef removed from the target pawn on successful completion of this surgery.

addsHediffOnFailure.label: Adds hediff on failure
addsHediffOnFailure.description: HediffDef applied to the target pawn when this surgery fails.

changesHediffLevel.label: Changes hediff level
changesHediffLevel.description: HediffDef whose severity level is adjusted by this surgery instead of adding or removing it outright.

incompatibleWithHediffTags.label: Incompatible with hediff tags
incompatibleWithHediffTags.description: Tag strings. This recipe cannot be applied to a pawn that already has a hediff carrying any of these tags.

hediffLevelOffset.label: Hediff level offset
hediffLevelOffset.description: Amount added to the hediff severity when changesHediffLevel is set.

hideBodyPartNames.label: Hide body part names
hideBodyPartNames.description: When true, specific body part names are not shown in the surgery bill UI.

isViolation.label: Is violation
isViolation.description: When true, performing this recipe on a non-consenting pawn is treated as a social violation.

successfullyRemovedHediffMessage.label: Successfully removed hediff message
successfullyRemovedHediffMessage.description: Localized message shown when this surgery successfully removes a hediff.

surgerySuccessChanceFactor.label: Surgery success chance factor
surgerySuccessChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the base surgery success probability. Use 99999 for guaranteed success.

deathOnFailedSurgeryChance.label: Death on failed surgery chance
deathOnFailedSurgeryChance.description: Probability (0-1) that the patient dies when this surgery fails. Use 99999 for certain death on failure.

targetsBodyPart.label: Targets body part
targetsBodyPart.description: Whether the surgery targets a specific body part. Set to false for whole-pawn operations.

anesthetize.label: Anesthetize
anesthetize.description: Whether the patient must be anesthetized before this surgery can begin.

minPartCount.label: Min part count
minPartCount.description: Minimum number of the target body part the pawn must have remaining for this surgery to be available. Use -1 for no minimum.

surgeryIgnoreEnvironment.label: Surgery ignore environment
surgeryIgnoreEnvironment.description: When true, environment cleanliness is not factored into surgery success chance.

surgeryOutcomeEffect.label: Surgery outcome effect
surgeryOutcomeEffect.description: SurgeryOutcomeEffectDef that determines the outcome calculation for this surgery.

genderPrerequisite.label: Gender prerequisite
genderPrerequisite.description: If set, this recipe can only be applied to pawns of the specified gender.

mustBeFertile.label: Must be fertile
mustBeFertile.description: When true, this recipe can only be applied to fertile pawns.

allowedForQuestLodgers.label: Allowed for quest lodgers
allowedForQuestLodgers.description: Whether quest lodgers (temporary visitors) can have this recipe performed on them.

minAllowedAge.label: Min allowed age
minAllowedAge.description: Minimum biological age in years the pawn must be for this recipe to be available. Use -1 for no minimum.

developmentalStageFilter.label: Developmental stage filter
developmentalStageFilter.description: DevelopmentalStage flags (comma-separated) restricting which life stages this recipe applies to. Omit for no restriction.

humanlikeOnly.label: Humanlike only
humanlikeOnly.description: When true, this recipe can only be performed on humanlike pawns.

mutantPrerequisite.label: Mutant prerequisite
mutantPrerequisite.description: List of MutantDef references. The pawn must be one of these mutant types for this recipe to be available.

mutantBlacklist.label: Mutant blacklist
mutantBlacklist.description: List of MutantDef references. The recipe is unavailable for pawns that are any of these mutant types.

smeltingWorkAmount.label: Smelting work amount
smeltingWorkAmount.description: Work ticks used when this recipe is the smelting recipe and the target is smeltable. Use -1 for no override.

researchPrerequisite.label: Research prerequisite
researchPrerequisite.description: Single ResearchProjectDef that must be completed before this recipe is available.

memePrerequisitesAny.label: Meme prerequisites any
memePrerequisitesAny.description: List of MemeDef references. The player faction must follow at least one of these memes for this recipe to be available.

researchPrerequisites.label: Research prerequisites
researchPrerequisites.description: Multiple ResearchProjectDef references all of which must be completed before this recipe is available.

factionPrerequisiteTags.label: Faction prerequisite tags
factionPrerequisiteTags.description: Tag strings. The player faction must have all listed tags on its def for this recipe to be available.

fromIdeoBuildingPreceptOnly.label: From ideo building precept only
fromIdeoBuildingPreceptOnly.description: When true, this recipe is only available if the player's ideology has a precept granting its product building.

conceptLearned.label: Concept learned
conceptLearned.description: ConceptDef that the player learns when this recipe is first performed.

dontShowIfAnyIngredientMissing.label: Don't show if any ingredient missing
dontShowIfAnyIngredientMissing.description: When true, the recipe bill option is hidden if any required ingredient type is completely unavailable.

displayPriority.label: Display priority
displayPriority.description: Sort order for this recipe in the recipe list UI. Lower values appear first.

formingTicks.label: Forming ticks
formingTicks.description: Ticks required to form a mech gestator product. Used for mech gestation recipes.

mechanitorOnlyRecipe.label: Mechanitor only recipe
mechanitorOnlyRecipe.description: When true, this recipe can only be performed by a mechanitor.

gestationCycles.label: Gestation cycles
gestationCycles.description: Number of gestation cycles required to produce a mech via this recipe.

mechResurrection.label: Mech resurrection
mechResurrection.description: When true, this recipe is a mech resurrection recipe rather than a standard crafting or gestation recipe.

basic-recipe.label: Basic recipe
basic-recipe.description: Crafting recipe with a job string and work amount.
